abilities.name: Infused with the Blessings of Nurgle
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is Afflicted.

abilities.name: Curse of the Walking Pox
abilities.desc:
Each time a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit makes an attack that destroys an enemy model (excluding ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models), after this unit has resolved its attacks, you can return one destroyed ^^**Poxwalker^^** model to this unit.

While ^^**Typhus^^** is leading this unit, enemy models destroyed as a result of ^^**Typhus^^**’ Eater Plague ability count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit for the purposes of this ability.

abilities.name: Silent Bodyguard
abilities.desc: While a ^^**Character^^** model is leading this unit, that ^^**Character^^** model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Death Approaches
abilities.desc: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all Afflicted enemy units, and more than 9" horizontally away from any other enemy units.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Blistering Fusillade
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 5 or more, or if a ^^**Character^^** is leading this unit, then each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Lethal Ichor
abilities.desc: Each time a melee attack is allocated to a model in this unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Tank Hunters
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time a model in this unit makes a attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Fearsome (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

abilities.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Infectious Bloodshed
abilities.desc: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Diseased icon
abilities.desc: Melee weapons in the bearer's unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Infected Outbreak
abilities.desc: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Death’s Heads
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Grotesque Regeneration
abilities.desc: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^Titanic^^ units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Death Guard Defenders
abilities.desc: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Fevered Strategist
abilities.desc: Once per Battle Round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Miasma of Pestilence (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Nurgle with wings

abilities.name: Horrifying Visage
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Enfeebling Miasma (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^*Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ^^**Blightlord Terminators^^**
■ ^^**Deathshroud Terminators^^**
■ ^^**Poxwalkers^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: The Destroyer Hive
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Eater Plague (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this ^^**Psyker^^** (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this ^^**Psyker^^** and roll one D6: on a 1, this ^^**Psyker^^**'s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ PLAGUE MARINES

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ DEATHSHROUD TERMINATORS

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Virulent Aura
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Blight Bombardment
abilities.desc: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 (if that attack is made with a Blast weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead).

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Blightlord Terminators^^**
- ^^**Deathshroud Terminators^^**

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Vector of Disease
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[Sustained Hits 1]** and **[Lance]** abilties.

abilities.name: Unholy Resilience
abilities.desc: The first time a model with this ability is destroyed in a battle round, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. Each model can only be set up in this way once per battle.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Blightlord Terminators^^**
- ^^**Deathshroud Terminators^^**

units.name: Death Guard Sorcerer in Terminator Armour [Legends]

rangedWeapons.name: ➤ Curse of the Leper - focused witchfire

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ BLIGHTLORD TERMINATORS
■ DEATHSHROUD TERMINATORS

abilities.name: Putrescent Vitality (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in this PSYKER’s unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Pestilent Familiar (Psychic)
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after selecting targets for a Psychic weapon equipped by this model, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 2.

abilities.name: Gift of Contagion (Psychic)
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack which targets a unit which is Afflicted, that attack has the [Sustained Hits 1] ability.

abilities.name: Pestilent Fallout (Psychic)
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Plague Wind. Until the end of your opponent's next turn, that unit is enfeebled. While a unit is enfeebled, subtract 2" from the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
^^**Plague Marines^^**, ^^**Poxwalkers^^**

abilities.name: Sickening Vitality
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Tocsin of Misery (Aura)
abilities.desc: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a ^^**Psyker^^** unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Plague Marines^^**, ^^**Poxwalkers^^**
*You can attach this model to a ^^**Plague Marines^^** or ^^**Poxwalkers^^** unit, even if one other Leader unit has already been attached to it (you cannot attach more than one of the same Leader to the same unit). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abilities.name: Putrefying Stink
abilities.desc: Enemy models cannot start or end an Advance move within 9" of this model.

abilities.name: Blinding Spray
abilities.desc: In the Fight phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability to use this ability. If you do, until the end of that phase, that model's unit has the Fights First ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per battle.

abilities.name: Extraction of Fresh Disease
abilities.desc: The first time this model's unit destroys an enemy unit as a result of a melee attack, until the end of the battle, add 6 to the Objective Control characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Foul Infusion
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only on a 6.

abilities.name: Malicious Calculations
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Seven-fold Chant
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, roll 2D6: on a 7+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Tainted Narthecium
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abilities.name: Inflamed Infections
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. If that unit is below Half-strength, an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit instead.

abilities.name: Diseased Malice
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Froth-spattered Frenzy
abilities.desc: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

abilities.name: Hovering Death
abilities.desc: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Spore-laced Shock Waves
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model's Plagueburst mortar, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit, adding 1 to that roll if the unit being rolled for is Afflicted. On a 6+, the unit being rolled for is struck by spores; after resolving all of this model's attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by spores suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.desc: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Metalophagic Infection
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Hail of Corrosive Disease
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friending ^^**Death Guard^^** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through friendly ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models and terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Barrage of Filth
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Fire Support
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport**^^ this turn makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

rangedWeapons.name: Rotwind
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Blast, Devastating Wounds, Lethal Hits, Psychic

abilities.name: Host of Plagues
abilities.desc: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Lord of the Death Guard
abilities.desc: Once per turn, this model can use one of the Lord of the Death Guard abilties.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Unclean Icon
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Blessed Icon of Disease
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Putrescent Fog (Aura)
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Diseased Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Deployment
abilities.desc: Both parts of this ^^**Fortification**^^ must be deployed within 1" of each other. Both parts are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abilities.name: Revolting Regeneration

abilities.name: Lord of Chaos
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Plague Marines^^**

abilities.name: Gift of Poxes
abilities.desc: Add 3" to the range of this model's Contagion Range.

abilities.name: Shroud of Disease
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking unit is within 18".

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Nurgle (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly ^^Plague Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that unit is rotted. While a unit is rotted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Virulent Blessing (Psychic)
abilities.desc: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a ^^**Plague Legions^^** model is allocated to a model in that unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Deluge of Nurgle (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 2 from the Move characteristic and subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

units.name: Foetid Bloat-drone with heavy blight launcher

abilities.name: Explosive Blight
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that destroys an enemy unit, before removing the last model in that unit from play, roll a D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, each enemy unit within 6" of that model is Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.
